title: Add a new item to the packing list
preconditions: User is logged in and on the 'Packing for the hospital' screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Add Item' input field. | Type 'Baby blanket' into the input field. | Press 'Enter' to add the item to the list.
expected_result: The item 'Baby blanket' is added to the packing list.

title: Check off an item from the packing list
preconditions: User is logged in and on the 'Packing for the hospital' screen with at least one item checked off
test_steps: Locate and click on the checkbox next to 'Insurance cards; birth plan'.
expected_result: The checkbox next to 'Insurance cards; birth plan' is marked as completed.

title: Delete an item from the packing list
preconditions: User is logged in and on the 'Packing for the hospital' screen with at least one item checked off
test_steps: Locate and click on the item 'Phone & charger'. | Locate and click on the delete icon next to 'Phone & charger'.
expected_result: The item 'Phone & charger' is removed from the packing list.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
preconditions: User is logged in and on the 'Packing for the hospital' screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the Header/App Bar.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Verify data persistence after app restart
preconditions: User is logged in and on the 'Packing for the hospital' screen with at least one item checked off
test_steps: Exit the app and relaunch it. | Verify that the packing list and checked items are still present.
expected_result: The packing list and checked items are still present in the app.
